Name: USGS Earthquake Hazards Program
Description: Real-time earthquake data via GeoJSON, CSV, and KML feeds from the USGS Earthquake Hazards Program.
Notes: Free, no auth required. Public domain data.

Datasets.Name: USGS Earthquakes (Past 7 Days)
Datasets.Description: All earthquakes worldwide in the past 7 days. Updates every 5 minutes. Fields: time, latitude, longitude, depth, mag, magType, nst, gap, dmin, rms, net, id, updated, place, type.

Name: Treasury Fiscal Data API
Description: Programmatic access to federal financial data including national debt, exchange rates, and government spending.
Notes: Free, no auth required. Supports JSON, CSV, XML output formats.

Datasets.Name: Treasury Debt to the Penny
Datasets.Description: Daily US national debt figures showing total public debt outstanding. Fields: record_date, debt_held_public_amt, intragov_hold_amt, tot_pub_debt_out_amt.

Datasets.Name: Treasury Exchange Rates
Datasets.Description: Foreign currency exchange rates used for federal government reporting. Fields: record_date, country, currency, exchange_rate, effective_date.

Name: USGS National Water Information System
Description: Real-time water data from thousands of monitoring stations including streamflow, water levels, and water quality.
Notes: Free, no auth required. RDB tab-delimited format with comment headers.

Datasets.Name: USGS Streamflow - Potomac River
Datasets.Description: Real-time streamflow (discharge) data for the Potomac River at Little Falls, DC. Site 01646500, Parameter 00060 (cubic feet per second). Updates every 15 minutes.

Name: BLS Public Data API
Description: Economic time series data including employment, prices, compensation, and productivity statistics.
Notes: Free for limited requests. Registration key available for higher rate limits.

Datasets.Name: BLS Consumer Price Index
Datasets.Description: Consumer Price Index for All Urban Consumers (CPI-U), all items, US city average. Series CUUR0000SA0. Fields: year, period, periodName, value, footnotes.
Datasets.AuthRequirements: None (optional API key for higher limits)

Name: NOAA National Centers for Environmental Information
Description: Global Historical Climatology Network (GHCN) and other climate datasets from NOAA NCEI.
Notes: Free, no auth required. Fixed-width, CSV, and NetCDF formats available.

Datasets.Name: NOAA Weather Station Inventory
Datasets.Description: GHCN-Daily weather station inventory. Fixed-width format with ~120,000+ stations globally. Columns: ID (11), Latitude (8), Longitude (9), Elevation (6), State (2), Name (30), GSN Flag (3), HCN Flag (3), WMO ID (5).
